summary: Impact assessment specific to Kaduna State Government's SIFMIS (Dynamics NAV) infrastructure. Maps the Remita breach to each SIFMIS module (Finance, Payroll/HRMIS, Procurement, Budget, Pension), identifies affected state stakeholders (Ministry of Finance, KADIRS, 23 LGAs, all MDAs), models four critical risk scenarios (TSA forgery, identity theft, ghost workers, revenue diversion), and provides prioritized action items.
